subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The wealth of this world is even as the sand dunes, which the winds do scatter from place to place with each passing day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی ثروت دنیا مانند تپه های رمل است که بادها هر روز از جاای بجای
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @thankfulness; gratitude
